g.text: SQL Three-Valued Logic: TRUE / FALSE / NULL
WHERE Rule: row included ONLY when predicate = TRUE (NULL and FALSE both exclude)
WHERE age = NULL -> 0 rows (NULL=NULL is NULL, not TRUE)
WHERE age != 25 -> excludes age=NULL rows (NULL!=25 is NULL)
NOT (age = 25) -> excludes age=NULL rows (NOT NULL = NULL)
WHERE age IS NULL -> correct: finds rows with no age value
WHERE age IS NOT NULL -> correct: excludes rows with no age value
WHERE age != 25 OR age IS NULL -> correct inclusive filter
WHERE x = NULL -> finds NULL rows
NULL rows appear in filtered results
NULL IS NULL -> TRUE <- use this
